_comment: WC2026 Group A, MD3 (simultaneous). Standings before: Mexico 6, South Korea 3 (2-1 Czech, 0-1 Mexico), Czech 1, South Africa 1 (0-2 Mexico, 1-1 Czech). South Korea needs a result to secure a top-2 / best-third spot; South Africa must win for any chance. Both motivated. South Korea the better side (organized, beat Czech) but South Africa competitive. Modest favourite, near LOW/MEDIUM. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: South Korea (3 pts) wants the win/point to qualify; South Africa (1 pt) must win to chase a third-place spot. Both have something to play for.

home.name: South Korea
notes: Organized, technical Asian side; beat Czech 2-1, lost narrowly to Mexico. attack 1.08.
Needs a result -> will play on the front foot.

away.name: South Africa
notes: Competitive; drew Czech 1-1, lost to Mexico. attack 0.85.
Must win -> will commit, but limited going forward. defense 1.05.
